src: A plush octopus with a black body and red accents on its tentacles. Its eyes are stylized with red and yellow flame patterns, giving it a fierce look.
edit: A cute plush octopus with a sky-blue body and pastel pink accents on its tentacles. Its eyes are large, bright, and cartoonishly wide, with star-shaped patterns.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is tilted slightly on a wooden table, next to a metal edge and red grid paper. The background features a partially open drawer and a visible power outlet.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object sits upright on a striped fabric chair. The background consists of vertical black and silver stripes with no other visible objects.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object rests on a black metal bike rack, with parts of a white wall and a yellow circular object in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is placed on a wooden shelf. The background includes a variety of colorful boxes and canned goods on a shelf.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is tilted slightly on a wooden table underwater, next to a metal edge and blue coral. The background features bubbles and a school of small fish.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object sits upright on a striped fabric chair in an underwater setting. The background consists of vertical coral formations with subtle light beams.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object rests on a black metal bike rack, with parts of an underwater cave wall and colorful sea anemones in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object is placed on a wooden shelf underwater. The background includes a variety of colorful coral and shelled sea creatures on a shelf.
